title: No Armadillo ❌
description: Disable Armadillo in Minecraft by preventing its spawning and removing any that appear in the world
body:
Disable Armadillo in Minecraft by preventing its spawning and removing any instances that appear in the world. Designed as a standalone mod within the Mob Control collection for players who want full control over hostile mob behavior.

https://modrinth.com/organization/mob-control
